accurate.why: The claims present (compensation changes, fee adjustments, judgeship extensions) are accurate to the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims appear in the partial summary.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly identifies the bill's primary purposes in the opening sentence.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The summary cuts off mid-sentence and fails to describe the specific amendments to title 11 section 330, title 28, and prior judgeship acts.

exceptions_conditions.why: The summary omits material conditions such as preservation of fee waivers for indigent filers and application/commencement conditions.

effective_dates.why: The summary omits the effective date provisions and the fiscal years 2026-2031 timing the bill specifies.

major_provisions_covered.why: The summary is truncated and does not complete coverage of trustee compensation increase, fee allocations, or quarterly fee changes.

objective_tone.why: The tone is neutral and non-partisan throughout.

coherent.why: The summary ends abruptly mid-sentence ('raise the'), making it incomplete and not fully coherent.

concise.why: The text present is concise with no padding or filler.

correct_entities.why: Chapter 7 trustees, bankruptcy fees, and temporary judgeships are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The truncated summary states no figures to evaluate.
